indicators.name: glass ceiling panels
indicators.rationale: Glass ceiling panels allow natural light to flood the space, which can be disruptive to sleep.

indicators.name: curved concrete walls
indicators.rationale: Curved concrete walls lack the flat, unobstructed surfaces typically associated with sleep-friendly environments.

indicators.name: lack of furniture
indicators.rationale: The absence of furniture such as beds, nightstands, or other sleep-related items makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene lacks the necessary objects and spatial features typically associated with a sleep-friendly environment. The glass ceiling panels and curved concrete walls contribute to a visually stimulating and potentially disruptive atmosphere, while the absence of furniture further undermines the suitability for sleep.
